subcodes.title: Letter to Quddus
subcodes.first_line: He addresseth Mullá Muḥammad-'Alí-i-Mázandarání, who is entitled Quddús, and dedicateth it unto each [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یخاطب به الملا محمد علی المازندرانی الملقب بالقدوس و یخصص به کل واحد
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam
